title: GripEvent
description: Thin event header — minimal organisational data identifying a motorsport event. Per-stage logistics (start/finish lines, time controls, speed limits, staging) live in event-details documents; per-stage geometry in stage-geometry; per-stage driver notes in pace-note. App-specific data lives under namespaced `extensions` objects on the top-level event.

extensions.description: App-specific namespaced data. Keys are app slugs (kebab-case recommended, e.g. 'grip-note'); values are objects owned by that app.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the event schema this document conforms to.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). For multi-day events, the event's first competitive day.

endDate.description: Optional ISO 8601 end date for multi-day events. Null for single-day.

discipline.description: Type of motorsport event. `stage_rally` distinguishes the classic stage format from a single-stage rally; `other` is the escape hatch for disciplines we haven't named.

organizer.description: Free-text name of the organising body or club.

venue.description: Free-text name of the venue or region (e.g. 'Sandia Mountains, NM').

id.description: Optional stable identifier for implementations that need it. Not required for exchange; natural keys (name + date) are authoritative.
